chunks.text: ORDER SHEET HIGH COURT OF SINDH, CIRCUIT COURT HYDERABAD Crl. Revision Application No.S-77 of 2018 DATE ORDER WITH SIGNATURE OF JUDGE(S) 22.10.2025 Mr.Muhammad Jameel Ahmed, Advocate for respondents No.5 to 9 amd 11 to 13 Ms.Sana Memon, A.P.G ********** None is present for the applicant. No intimation has been received. The same was the case on the last two dates. It appears that applicant has lost interest in this matter. Dismissed for non-prosecution. JUDGE AHSAN K. ABRO
